name: Marketing Day Orchestrator
description: The daily marketing cycle in one run. Step 1 builds the blog post (becomes the day's source of truth). Step 2 fans out social drafts from the blog post via preserveParentText. Newsletter is intentionally OFF (no email list yet - re-add Marketing Newsletter as a third step once EmailCapture has 25+ signups; see CONTEXT.md). All outputs are separate artifacts Lawrence reviews + dispatches in his morning hour.
